I found a matching appointment but not an event exactly titled "Dental check-up." Details of the likely match:

- Event id: 5

Before I reschedule, two quick confirmations so I don't make the wrong change:

1) Is this the event you mean (the "Dentist Appointment" above) and should I reschedule that one to start 2024-05-20 at 10:00? If so, I will keep the same duration (1 hour), making the new end time 2024-05-20 11:00.
2) I need the clinic's email address to notify them. The event doesn't list a clinic email. Please provide the clinic email to include (or confirm you want me to only notify your email).

Tell me "Yes — reschedule id 5" and give the clinic email (or say to proceed without clinic notification) and I will make the change and send the emails.
